case_title: CHAD BAUMBACH et al VS. ALLERGAN,INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-15-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHAD BAUBACH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF TRACY BAUMBACH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLERGAN, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STIPULATIONS TO ALLOW JPT IS ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM LY RECUSED HERSELF FROM THE CASE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: GARRETT WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAUMBACH, CHAD BAUMBACH, TRACY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLERGAN,INC. $9,125.90 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,265.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $65. SERVED MAY-12-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALLERGAN,INC.
